title: Populate department list with full academic department data

requirements.text:
Replace the current backend department seed/initial data with the full list of academic departments grouped by faculty. The departments must be pre-populated (or seeded on first deploy) with the following entries:

**Computer Science Faculty (UG):** B.Sc. - Computer Science, BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications), B.Sc. - Information Technology, B.Sc. - Computer Technology, B.Sc. - Data Science, B.Sc. - Computer Science(AI & ML), B.Sc. - Computer Science(AI), B.Sc. - Computer Science(AI & Data Science), B.Sc. - Computer Science(Cyber Security)
**Computer Science Faculty (PG):** M.Sc. - Computer Science

**Life Sciences Faculty (UG):** B.Sc. - Biotechnology, B.Sc. - Biochemistry, B.Sc. - Microbiology, B.Sc. - Zoology, B.Sc. - Clinical Laboratory Technology
**Life Sciences Faculty (PG):** M.Sc. - Biotechnology, M.Sc. - Biochemistry, M.Sc. – Microbiology

**Physical Sciences Faculty (UG):** B.Sc. - Physics, B.Sc. - Chemistry, B.Sc. - Mathematics, B.Sc. - Statistics, B.Sc. - Electronics & Communication, B.Sc. - Internet of Things
**Physical Sciences Faculty (PG):** M.Sc - Physics, M.Sc. - Chemistry, M.Sc. - Mathematics

**Commerce & Management Faculty (UG):** B.Com, B.Com (CA), B.Com (PA), B.Com (IT), B.B.A.
**Commerce & Management Faculty (PG):** M.Com

**Arts & Applied Sciences Faculty (UG):** B.A. - English, B.Sc. - Hotel Management & Catering Science, B.Sc. - Textile and Fashion Design
**Arts & Applied Sciences Faculty (PG):** M.A., - English

Each department entry should include its name and a description derived from its faculty group (e.g., "Computer Science Faculty – UG").

quotes:
UG
B.Sc. - Computer Science
BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications)...

acceptanceCriteria: All 30+ departments listed by the user are present in the backend department store after deployment.
Each department has a non-empty name matching the user-provided list exactly.
Each department has a description indicating its faculty group and level (UG/PG).
Existing complaints and access control state are not affected.
The admin Department Management page displays all seeded departments.

requirements.text: Update the frontend department dropdown in the complaint submission form and the profile setup modal to display all departments from the backend, ensuring the full seeded list (30+ entries) is rendered correctly without truncation or layout issues.
acceptanceCriteria: The department dropdown in SubmitComplaintPage shows all 30+ departments.
The department dropdown in ProfileSetupModal shows all 30+ departments.
Dropdowns are scrollable and no department name is cut off.
Selecting any department from the list correctly saves/submits the selection.

constraints: Do not alter existing complaint or access control data structures.
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
Department names must match the user-provided list exactly, including punctuation and abbreviations.
nonGoals: Adding new UI pages or redesigning existing pages.
Changing the role-based access control logic.
Adding faculty-group filtering UI (only flat list required for now).
